name: CaseResolution
what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references CaseResolution.
how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['patient_state', 'axis_results', 'ranked_interventions', 'audit_trail', 'ruo', 'disclaimer']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
why_it_exists: Immutable snapshot returned by the orchestrator; every response carries the audit trail and RUO flag.
